title: SlashBlade YSM Render-Patch
description: This mod fixes an issue where SlashBlade models fail to render when using SlashBlade: Resharped together with Yes Steve Model.
body:
This mod fixes a bug where SlashBlade models fail to render when using [SlashBlade:Resharped](https://modrinth.com/mod/slashblade-resharped) together with [Yes Steve Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/yes-steve-model).

Before
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hBMbETMt/images/330456f851db324f762a0e1f7e7390b082d42785.png)
After
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hBMbETMt/images/44aaf2a41837b274c261cda8dbe7f625514977e1.png)
